creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->suspended

Mark as suspended since the maintainer does not have a sufficiently 
current -CURRENT to test with. 

Although I'm not particularly happy with suspending this PR, it's 
true that -CURRENT is a fast-moving target ATM.  Perhaps someone else 
has a clue about why the configure is failing?
